fields.System.Title: FX TRF Trade Creation
fields.System.Description: As a Maker, I want to create FX TRF trades via the trading portal and API, so that they can be submitted for Checker approval and go live
fields.Microsoft.VSTS.Common.AcceptanceCriteria:
• Maker can create a new FX TRF trade via POST /trades/create API with valid payload and receive 200 response
  • Created trade is persisted in the database with correct field values
  • Trade instrument structure is valid and can be retrieved via GET /trades/{id}
  • Maker can create a new FX TRF trade through the trading portal UI
  • After Maker submits, trade shows status 'Pending Approval' in the blotter
  • Checker can approve the pending trade and status changes to 'Live'
  • Maker can create FX TRF StepIn Full trade through the portal with correct lifecycle
  • Maker can create FX TRF StepIn Partial trade through the portal with correct lifecycle
